---
name: Skill improvement
about: Suggest a stronger trigger, example, rule, or packaging improvement
title: "[Idea] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What real user problem is not covered well today?

## Proposed Improvement

Describe the rule, example, packaging change, or workflow improvement you want.

## Why It Matters

Who benefits, and what failure mode does this prevent?

## Example Prompt

Give one concrete prompt or scenario that would show the improvement.
